mapper.select: select * from nx_community_dispatch_stop where nx_cds_plan_id = #{value} order by nx_cds_route_seq
select * from nx_community_dispatch_stop where nx_cds_driver_route_id = #{value} order by nx_cds_route_seq
mapper.insert: insert into nx_community_dispatch_stop (nx_cds_plan_id, nx_cds_driver_route_id, nx_cds_community_id, nx_cds_address_id, nx_cds_customer_name, nx_cds_customer_phone, nx_cds_lat, nx_cds_lng, nx_cds_address_text, nx_cds_stop_status, nx_cds_route_seq, nx_cds_service_date, nx_cds_service_time, nx_cds_assigned_driver_user_id, nx_cds_order_count, nx_cds_confirmed_at) values (#{nxCdsPlanId}, #{nxCdsDriverRouteId}, #{nxCdsCommunityId}, #{nxCdsAddressId}, #{nxCdsCustomerName}, #{nxCdsCustomerPhone}, #{nxCdsLat}, #{nxCdsLng}, #{nxCdsAddressText}, #{nxCdsStopStatus}, #{nxCdsRouteSeq}, #{nxCdsServiceDate}, #{nxCdsServiceTime}, #{nxCdsAssignedDriverUserId}, #{nxCdsOrderCount}, #{nxCdsConfirmedAt})
